color_palette.description: Strict 3-color palette: Deep Obsidian (Base), Pure White (Text/Borders), Cyber Yellow (Accent)

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-bold text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-white

grid_system.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 (Mode A: Tetris Grid)
grid_system.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 (Mode B: Control Room Grid)

layout_and_spacing.borders_and_surfaces: 1px solid border-white/15, zero border radius (rounded-none), no soft drop shadows. Use hard 4px offset shadows for brutalist accents if needed.

motion_and_interaction.animations: Framer Motion for micro-interactions. Example: Button click scale-down (scale: 0.98).

components.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none), bold uppercase text tracking-wider, bg-[#FACC15] text-[#0A0A0A] for primary. Outline with hover:bg-white/10 for secondary.
components.cards: Flat background (#0A0A0A), 1px solid white/15 border, internal padding p-6. No glassmorphism, stick to opaque solid surfaces.
components.inputs: Flat, bottom border only or full 1px square border, bg-transparent.
components.tabs: Square underline style, active tab gets border-b-2 border-[#FACC15] text-[#FACC15].

hero_background.description: Abstract neon yellow tech background for the landing page hero section overlay.

gamification_badge.description: 3D glowing badge to represent unlocked achievements in the gamified progress section.

student_coding.description: Student coding in a dark room setup for the feature highlight section.

developer_avatar.description: Avatar placeholder for the student profile and Q&A forum replies.

specific_feature_guidelines.coding_sandbox: Use a split-pane layout (e.g., react-split) with a dark theme code editor (Monaco or CodeMirror) on the left and a terminal output on the right. Maintain strict 1px borders.
specific_feature_guidelines.gamified_progress: Display a bento grid of badges. Inactive badges should be grayscale and 0.4 opacity. Active badges glow with the #FACC15 accent color and use a subtle drop-shadow.
specific_feature_guidelines.study_planner: Drag-and-drop kanban/calendar using dnd-kit. Cards should snap to grid. Use solid borders and high-contrast text.
specific_feature_guidelines.qa_forum: Threaded layout with vertical indentation lines on the left (border-l border-white/10). AI moderator replies should be distinctly highlighted with a #FACC15 left border.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='run-code-button', data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text on deep obsidian background passes WCAG AAA. Cyber Yellow text on dark background passes AA.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the 3-color palette constraint: #0A0A0A (Black), #FFFFFF (White), #FACC15 (Yellow). No extra colors.
Update /app/frontend/src/index.css to match the provided Shadcn variables. Add font-imports for 'Outfit' and 'JetBrains Mono'.
Do not use generic border radii; set '--radius: 0rem' to enforce sharp corners (rounded-none) for a technical brutalist feel.
For the drag-and-drop Study Planner, utilize @dnd-kit/core and @dnd-kit/sortable.
Ensure all Shadcn components are updated to remove soft shadows in favor of hard 1px borders.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide icons with sharp styling.
Do not use generic UI filler; build asymmetrical grids following the 'Tetris' rule for the landing page.
